epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis of depigmented macules; Wood lamp examination to confirm

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; response depends on early treatment and access to phototherapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in dermatology; Wood lamp in specialty clinics
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical corticosteroids or calcineurin inhibitors, phototherapy (NB-UVB), camouflage; systemic therapy for extensive disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to phototherapy outside major centers and stigma
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing dermatology services and availability of topical treatments
